habit: Replace part of daily salt with potassium-enriched salt (~30% less sodium)
nudge_primary: 'Today's BP protector: Are we cooking with lite salt?'
nudge_followup: Follow-up: 'Tiny switch, big impact. 50% less sodium today?'

habit: Keep at least one meal under 600 mg sodium (avoid packaged food, sauces, pickle, papad, restaurant food)
nudge_primary: 'Let's make lunch your Heart-Safe Meal. Skip pickle & papad today?'
nudge_followup: If high-sodium meal: 'No stress. Dinner can be your low-sodium reset'

habit: Add one serving (5–10g) soluble fiber daily (oats, isabgol, chia, flaxseeds, apple with skin, guava, rajma/chole, barley)
nudge_primary: Morning: 'Fiber first rule: Oats, chia, or isabgol today?'
nudge_followup: Night: 'Quick win: 1 tsp isabgol before bed = cholesterol shield'

habit: Eat one small portion of unsalted nuts daily (handful = 15-20g: almonds 6-8, walnuts 2 halves, pistachios 8-10, peanuts, mixed nuts)
nudge_primary: 'Snack swap? Nuts instead of namkeen today?'
nudge_followup: If fried snack: 'Tomorrow's snack = heart-smart handful'

habit: Include one plant omega-3 source daily (flaxseed 1 tbsp ground, chia seeds 1 tbsp, walnuts 2 halves, mustard oil, soybeans)
nudge_primary: 'Add 1 spoon flax or chia to boost heart omega-3?'
nudge_followup: Reminder: 'Small seed. Big artery protection.'

habit: Include one natural anti-platelet/anti-inflammatory spice or herb in meals (turmeric, garlic, ginger)
nudge_primary: 'Today's heart spice: haldi, garlic, or ginger?'

habit: Replace one refined carbohydrate with a whole-grain option (white rice→brown rice, maida→multigrain roti, white bread→whole wheat, suji→oats/dalia)
nudge_followup: If skipped: '2 swaps/week already reduces risk. Try tomorrow.'

habit: Set fixed daily meal times, consume each meal within ±30 min of scheduled time for at least 5 days/week
nudge_primary: Time-based reminders 15 min before each meal window. Notification if meal not logged within window.

habit: Start lunch or dinner with 1 cup cooked non-starchy vegetables/salad OR 1 serving protein before rice/roti/bread/pasta/potatoes
nudge_primary: Pre-meal reminder: 'Start with salad, dal, eggs, paneer, or vegetables before rice/roti'
nudge_followup: Confirmation checkbox during logging

habit: Do not consume any caffeine-containing beverages after 2:00 PM daily
nudge_primary: Alert at 1:45 PM: 'Caffeine window closes in 15 minutes'
nudge_followup:
If logged after 2PM: 'This may affect tonight's sleep. Continue?'
If poor sleep: 'Consider earlier caffeine cut-off today'

habit: Within 10 minutes after lunch or dinner, perform 2 minutes of standing calf raises (1 raise per second)
nudge_primary: Immediate trigger after meal log: '2-minute calf raises now to reduce glucose spike'
nudge_followup: Weekly: 'You reduced post-meal glucose spikes 6/7 times'

habit: Within 10 minutes after lunch or dinner, walk slowly for 5 minutes
nudge_primary: Countdown: 'Glucose spike window open - walk within next 10 minutes'
nudge_followup:
Streak: '2-day streak! Walk today to keep it going'
After: 'Great! You just reduced your glucose spike naturally'

habit: If sitting continuously for 60 minutes, stand up and walk/stretch/march in place for at least 1 full minute
nudge_primary: After 60 min inactivity: 'Time to stand and move for 1 minute'
nudge_followup: Sitting timer turns red at 60 min: 'You've been sitting too long'

habit: After long sitting or standing, lie down and raise both legs above heart level for 3 minutes
nudge_primary: Notification: 'Circulation reset: Lie down and elevate your legs for 3 minutes'
nudge_followup: Trigger: After 2 hours continuous sitting or at 8 PM

habit: Climb at least one short flight of stairs daily
nudge_primary: 'Stairs over lift today? Just one flight counts'
nudge_followup:
No response: '8 steps now > zero steps later'
If elevator: 'No worries. One flight tomorrow keeps the streak alive'

habit: Perform 30 seconds of ankle or foot rotations during long sitting
nudge_followup: If >60 min sitting: 'Time for a quick foot rotation break?'

habit: Perform 4 rounds of 20-second isometric handgrip squeezes (squeeze at ~30-40% max effort, rest 20-30 sec between rounds)
nudge_primary: '4 squeezes. 20 seconds each. BP training starts now?'
nudge_followup:
No response: '80 seconds total. Stronger vessels in under 2 minutes'
Skipped: 'One quick set before bed still counts'

habit: Practice slow breathing at 5-6 breaths per minute for 2 minutes daily (inhale ~5 sec, exhale ~5-6 sec)
nudge_followup: If stress/high HR logged: 'Heart racing? Try 2 minutes of slow breathing now'

habit: Practice nasal-only breathing for 5 minutes (mouth gently closed, breathe through nose while sitting/walking slowly)
nudge_followup: If stress logged: 'Try switching to nose-only breathing for 5 minutes'

habit: Splash cold water on face for 10-20 seconds (cool, not ice-cold)
nudge_followup: If stress/high HR: 'Heart racing? Try a 20-sec cold splash'

habit: Take a 2-minute mindfulness or meditation break (sit still, focus on breath or bodily sensations)
nudge_followup: If stress logged: 'Stress spike detected. Take your 2-minute reset now?'

habit: Maintain a fixed sleep and wake time daily
nudge_primary: 'Same sleep time tonight? Your heart loves routine'
nudge_followup:
Evening: 'Wind-down window starts now'
If slept late: 'Reset today — back to your regular sleep time'

15-min pre-cutoff: 'Last scroll. Night mode begins soon'
If screen use logged after cutoff: 'This may delay sleep. Continue or start wind-down?'

habit: Ensure at least 7 hours of sleep opportunity nightly
nudge_followup:
Evening: 'Count back 7 hours from wake-up — lights out by then?'
If slept <6.5 hrs: 'Recovery night today — protect your 7-hour window'

habit: Get 3-5 minutes of morning sunlight exposure (no sunglasses, no glass barrier)
nudge_primary: 'Step outside for 3 minutes? Morning light reset'
nudge_followup: If poor sleep: 'Prioritize morning light today to reset rhythm'

habit: Write one gratitude or positive reflection nightly (1 simple sentence — <1 minute)
nudge_followup: If stress logged: 'End the day with one positive anchor'

habit: Check blood pressure at home once weekly (sit quietly 5 min → feet flat → back supported → arm at heart level → 2 readings 1 min apart)
nudge_primary: 'BP check day. 5 minutes for your heart?'
nudge_followup: If last reading elevated: 'Let's recheck and track the trend'

habit: Brush and floss nightly without skipping (brush 2 min + floss once, no food after brushing)
nudge_primary: 'Teeth done for the day? Brush + floss = full reset'
nudge_followup: If skipped: 'Streak restart tonight — small habit, big impact'

habit: Maintain a zero-tobacco day (avoid active and passive exposure — no cigarettes, vaping, smokeless tobacco, secondhand smoke)
nudge_followup: If craving: 'Craving lasts minutes. Health gains last years. Pause 5 minutes?'
If exposure logged: 'Can you move to a smoke-free spot now?'
